seoTitle: Harpers Hill vs Harrington Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Harpers Hill and Harrington Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Harpers Hill vs Harrington Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Harpers Hill and Harrington Park.
heading: Harpers Hill vs Harrington Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Harpers Hill, New South Wales and Harrington Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Harrington Park has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Harpers Hill (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Harpers Hill or Harrington Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Harpers Hill has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Harrington Park scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Harpers Hill scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Harrington Park scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Harpers Hill or Harrington Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Harrington Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
